channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz closure will have ‘ripple effect for weeks if not months’
item.description: ‘We could still be suffering the ripple effect of this for weeks, if not months’.

item.title: How will soaring oil prices caused by Iran war impact food prices?
item.description: Oil and gas are not just fuel, they are raw materials for thousands of products, including fertilisers used in farming.

item.title: Could Trump ‘take over’ the Strait of Hormuz as oil prices rise?
item.description: Oil prices spiked after shipments through the Strait of Hormuz were disrupted amid the Iran war.

item.title: Russia the only ‘winner’ of US-Israel war on Iran: EU Council president
item.description: Antonio Costa says Russia benefits from soaring global energy prices and attention being diverted from war in Ukraine.

item.title: Rescue workers search rubble after strikes hit Tehran neighbourhood
item.description: Rescuers search rubble and aid injured in Tehran’s Resalat neighbourhood after a reported Israeli strike.

item.title: Pakistan orders sweeping austerity measures as Iran war triggers oil crisis
item.description: Four-day workweek for government employees and two-week closure of schools among the measures aimed at saving energy.

item.title: War on Iran fuelling Islamophobic social media surge in US: Report
item.description: US study reveals more than 25,300 Islamophobic posts on X since war began and intensifying hate speech against Muslims.

item.title: Iranian missile strikes central Israel amid escalating attacks
item.description: Video shows the moment an Iranian missile struck central Israel, part of a barrage that killed two people.

item.title: Hundreds killed in Haiti drone strikes, including 60 civilians: Report
item.description: Human Rights Watch says drone strikes by Haitian forces kill more than 1,200 people in, near Port-au-Prince since 2025.

item.title: ‘Short-term excursion’: What Trump said about the war on Iran
item.description: Donald Trump called the war on Iran a “short-term excursion”, saying the US already achieved “tremendous success”.
